title: Applications: LRC Circuits
content:
« Previous | Next »
Session Overview In this session we show how to model some basic electrical circuits with constant coefficient DE’s. We will see that the DE’s are identical to those for the mechanical systems studied earlier. We will also use complex techniques to define and understand impedance in these circuits.
Session Activities Read the course notes:
